Prodražení projektu díky kabeláži a elektromontážním pracím patří minulosti. Díky bezdrátovému systému si můžete přizpůsobit osvětlení podle vašich potřeb kdykoliv a odkudkoliv, včetně míst, která jsou pro běžnou instalaci nedostupná či nebezpečná (mokré prostory, hořlavé podklady, sklo atd.).

Aktuální informace naleznete na našem
LinkedIn profilu
About us
We are a purely Czech company that was founded in 1990. We are one of the leading manufacturers of wireless control systems with our own development base. Our portfolio includes systems for light and shade control, wireless sensors, switches and receivers, thermostats, programmable contact-making clocks and dimmers. We are also exclusive distributors of a whole range of renowned international companies supplying lighting appliances and electrical components. Our portfolio includes brands such as Waldmann, PiL, Spittler, Carlo Gavazzi, Omega, Italtronic and other.

Main page
About us
About us
Our mission
We are a Czech company with tradition and a personal approach. Thanks to innovation, quality and teamwork, we bring smart solutions to our customers.
Our vision
To be the first customer choice for individual and demanding projects.
WHAT WE DO
DEVELOPMENT & PRODUCTION - AN IMPORTANT PILLAR OF THE COMPANY
Our areas of specialization are wireless technologies and smart solutions for industrial complexes, office buildings, sports facilities, and towns and cities. We are also exclusive distributors of lighting products and electrical components. We provide our customers with comprehensive solutions in the areas of lighting, lighting control, energy metering, access systems, and custom development tailored to their specific needs.
Reference
OUR COMPANY VALUES
Each letter in our company name represents one of the values that underpin our work and relationships. Together, they form the foundation of our corporate culture - how we think, how we act and how we work together. These values guide us in every decision we make - from product development to the everyday communication between ourselves and our partners.
Are you interested in our direction? See if we have a suitable position for you.
Career
COMPANY HISTORY
The foundations of the company ENIKA.CZ were laid by friends Michal Geisler and Jiří Vávra back in 1990, when they together produced connecting cables for audio and video. Gradually, through cables, repairs of small electronics, and motion sensors for security technology, they got to switching lighting, which is the essence of what ENIKA.CZ is still doing today.
Read about how it all started in the articles below.
How it all began
35 years of Enika.cz
EXCLUSIVE COLLABORATION
Based on customer requirements, we
develop and manufacture turnkey electronics and electronic devices
according to applicable technical standards and within the framework of an established quality management system according to ISO 9001.
LONG-TERM COOPERATION WITH MANUFACTURERS ALL OVER THE WORLD
We have been developing a long-term sales representation for a wide portfolio of foreign lighting equipment manufacturers, automation component manufacturers, and electromechanical component manufacturers.
Our customers include most large electrical installation companies and specialized wholesalers in the Czech and Slovak Republics.
OUR PRODUCTS TO THE WHOLE WORLD
Our constantly expanding distribution network across Europe confirms that our products meet even the most stringent criteria and can withstand a highly competitive environment. At the same time, it is a huge motivation for us to improve, innovate and develop our products.
Cooperation
Years in the market
Export countries
Success factors
-&nbspOur Employees
16045
Items on eshop
We can make a tailor-made solution. We understand the principles, the design, we can test the product and modify it so that it really works. That is our strength – flexibility and practical experience. When development is in someone else's hands, communication is lost and the price increases. With us, everything is by personal agreement, therefore more efficient.
- interview with the owner Jiří Vávra (35 years ENIKA.CZ - 12/2025)
